name: GCS To BQ Text Analyzer
description: A streaming pipeline that checks a GCS bucket for new files, process them by counting every word, and writes the results in a BigQuery table, while also moving the processed file

parameters.name: inputPath
parameters.label: Input GCS Path
parameters.helpText: The GCS file pattern to monitor for new files (e.g., gs://my-bucket/inbox/*.txt).

parameters.name: outputTable
parameters.label: Results Output Table
parameters.helpText: BigQuery table to write to, e.g. (project:my-dataset.my-table)

parameters.name: processedPath
parameters.label: Archive Path
parameters.helpText: The GCS folder where original files are moved after successful processing (e.g., gs://my-bucket/archive/).
